column1: I (2) _____ on my own in the house because ...
... my husband (3) _____ on a business trip.
... as I (5) _____ the day shopping and cleaning.
After supper I (6) _____ television for a while...
... and then (7) _____ to go to bed early.
... when I (9) _____ the sounds of men's voices, talking quietly.
In my tiredness I (17) _____ to turn off the television.
